# Portugal by Train

> Guide to major train stations across Portugal, from the Minho to the Algarve, with budget hotel stays near key stops along CP railway lines.

Browse Portuguese railway stations with photos and recommended affordable accommodation nearby. Filter by line, search by name, and save your favorite stops privately.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Searchable list of Portugal train stations with nearby budget hotels, filters by service type and line, and private upvote/downvote per station.
